works: CLI `shardloom route`, `shardloom run`, and `shardloom prepare`, plus `ShardLoomContext.route(...)`, `ShardLoomContext.run(...)`, `ShardLoomContext.prepare(...)`, SQL workflow `.route()`/`.run()`, and DataFrame workflow `.route()`/`.run()`/`.prepare(...)` share the same route/admission metadata. Admitted run/prepare wrappers attach that metadata to scoped runtime or preparation envelopes, and bounded local-source `collect()`, general `write(...)` / `write_csv(...)`, structured write aliases, generated-source direct writes, source-free SQL writes, admitted local/generated fanout helpers, and explicit native Vortex primitive collect/local-execution helpers now route through the public `run` facade while preserving typed reports.
blocked: The facade does not yet reroute future helper families, any future native Vortex write-helper payloads, refresh benchmark timing, or claim broad SQL/DataFrame runtime support.
